briefdescription.para: This macro only expands when not compiling for release.

memberdef.name: MOOSE_DEBUG
memberdef.initializer: { \ stringstream ss; ss << a; \ cout << "DEBUG: " << __FILENAME__ << ":" << __LINE__ << " " << ss.str() << std::endl; \ }

memberdef.name: MOOSE_WARN
memberdef.initializer: { \ stringstream ss; ss << __func__ << ": " << a; \ moose::showWarn( ss.str() ); \ }
